title: CeLinkRegisterRequest
description: Body of POST /api/ce-link/register. Sent by a CE install (cloud-link Phase 1, doc/CLOUD_LINK_ONBOARDING.md §3.2). Mirrors `com.apimarketplace.auth.dto.CeLinkRegisterRequest` (Java) and the TS request type. Keep all three in lockstep.

installId.description: Stable UUID generated CE-side at first launch. Becomes the auth.ce_link PK on the cloud.

ceVersion.description: CE distribution version (e.g. "1.4.0"). Stamped on the REGISTER audit row metadata.

label.description: User-supplied display name for this install ("My laptop", "Office server"). Blank or omitted falls back to the default "CE install".
